rows.label: tev062101_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Mumutsu about Tatsu's glasses.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062101_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062101_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Mumutsu about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062101_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Mumutsu about recent developments.

rows.label: tev062101_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Mumutsu about Tatsu.

rows.label: tev062101_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Mumutsu what she will do next.

rows.label: tev062101_MSG0001
rows.name:
Does friend know why brotherpon
Tatsu wears glasses?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062101_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Because Tatsu cannot
see well? Bzzt! Wrong![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062101_MSG0003
rows.name:
Glasses are for show. Tatsu
is going for certain look.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062101_MSG0004
rows.name:
Tatsu start wearing them to
look more like dadapon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062101_MSG0005
rows.name:
But Tatsu not have same fashion sense as
dadapon. Tatsu look like total dweeb![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062101_MSG0008
rows.name: Is brotherpon Tatsu behaving?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062101_MSG0009
rows.name:
Tatsu better not be getting in hair
of friends and working up debt just
to become heropon next year![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062101_MSG0010
rows.name:
Truth is, brotherpon Tatsu
is unreliable, and brotherpon
Satsu sleep all the time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062101_MSG0011
rows.name:
Also, sisterpon Yoyotsu spend all
day eating, while brotherpon Gotsu
always making up stories.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062101_MSG0012
rows.name:
Mumutsu is youngest, but only one who
actually seem to care about family.
Pull it together, siblings! Mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062101_MSG0017
rows.name:
Mo! Why does Satsu always
have to cause trouble?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062101_MSG0018
rows.name:
Well, at least Mumutsu got
to go on fun adventure.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062101_MSG0019
rows.name:
That was first time Mumutsu got to
go outside caravan all by lonesome.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062101_MSG0020
rows.name:
If Mumutsu eventually become Nopon
heropon, Mumutsu can go to all
kinds of interesting places![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062101_MSG0021
rows.name:
Mumutsu starting to see appeal
of whole heropon thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062101_MSG0025
rows.name:
Friend want to know why brotherpons and
sisterpons call Tatsu "Dadapon"? Okay.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062101_MSG0026
rows.name:
It is because family want Tatsu to become
strong, just like our real dadapon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062101_MSG0027
rows.name:
Even though dadapon is tuft-deep in debt,
dadapon work REALLY hard to pay it off
without any complaints. Mumutsu is so proud![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062101_MSG0028
rows.name:
Now Mumutsu just need to find boyfriend
as strong as dadapon and get married![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062101_MSG0035
rows.name: Are all Growth baddies gone?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062101_MSG0036
rows.name:
Then that means castle in Cauldros is
empty now! Future Nopon city secured![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062101_MSG0037
rows.name:
Mumutsu will be leader, of course.
Beautiful princess of Castle Nopon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062101_MSG0038
rows.name:
Gotsu can be honorary prince
since Mumutsu always have to
look after Gotsu anyway.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062101_MSG0039
rows.name:
Time to get down to princess
training. *ahem* Bow, worm! Attend
to every need of Princess Mumutsu![ST:wait ]
